issues: The right-aligned stats in the hero section feel slightly disconnected and the 'PORTFOLIO 2025' text is too small.
The contact form's right column (email, location, LinkedIn) is visually plain compared to the rest of the site's design.
The 'Download CV' button's styling and proximity to the primary CTA could be improved for clearer hierarchy.
The right-aligned sidebar in the hero section feels somewhat disconnected from the main content flow.
The 'Hire Me' button in the header feels somewhat disconnected from the primary CTA style and overall navigation.
strengths: Excellent typography with a bold display font for headings, creating a strong and modern brand identity.
Cohesive and intentional dark theme with a well-chosen accent color, contributing to a premium feel.
Excellent typography with a bold display font for headings, giving a strong, modern personality.
Cohesive dark theme with a well-chosen accent color, applied consistently and sparingly.
Cohesive and effective dark color system with a well-chosen, sparingly used accent color.
specific_improvements: Enhance the contact information section with more visually integrated icons or a slightly more styled presentation to match the site's polish.
Refine the right-aligned stats in the hero section: increase text size for 'PORTFOLIO 2025' and integrate stats more cohesively.
Adjust the 'Download CV' button styling or placement to better differentiate it from the primary 'View Projects' CTA, perhaps as a text link or a secondary button style.
Integrate the hero section's right sidebar content (awards, stars, rating) more organically into the main content area, perhaps below the main hero text or within a more defined section.
Refine the '8+ YEARS EXPERIENCE' stats section to align more precisely with the main content grid and give it a clearer visual container or grouping.
